decision.summary: No new action: the daily 74k dip is already live, and reconciliation is currently broken so no additional entry is allowed.
decision.rationale: The bearish daily BTC $74k dip opened in the previous cycle has now settled into live positions, but account_state still shows no open positions and zero open exposure. That breaks the reconciliation gate, which under the playbook blocks any fresh opening until state catches up. The existing 74k dip does not meet take-profit or invalidation criteria yet, and while other candidates exist on the board, opening anything else now would duplicate or stack risk while the tracked state is incoherent.
